description: Heuristic lexicon for store review sentiment (user-review-derived keywords and patterns). | Vivindis: Streamlit store_review lexicon + prompt/analyzer türevi ifadeler. | Claude guidance v1: app/data/guidance/claude_spotify_heuristic_guidance.json (147 örnek + heuristics). | Claude guidance v2: app/data/guidance/claude_spotify_heuristic_guidance_v2.json (452 ek örnek, batch 2). | Claude guidance final v3: app/data/guidance/claude_spotify_heuristic_guidance_final_v3.json (özet analiz, top_phrases + örnekler). | Claude guidance batch4: app/data/guidance/claude_spotify_heuristic_guidance_batch4.json (batch 4 yorumlar + 4 batch birleşik özet). | Claude guidance batch5 TR: app/data/guidance/claude_spotify_heuristic_guidance_batch5_tr.json (500 TR-ağırlıklı örnek + özet).
